The '''Nubus system''', also known as the '''Nubia system''', was a five-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region. It contained the planet [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]].<ref name="CatCW" /> and was located in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

{{System-stub}}
